description.initial: You've wandered to the edge of the western lands, where civilization fades into wilderness. The terrain here is rugged and uninviting, with scattered rocks and sparse vegetation clinging to thin soil. To the east lies the Enchanted Forest, its treeline visible in the distance, beckoning with mystery. There's little reason to linger here at the world's edge.
description.return: The western edge of the lands. Empty and windswept, with the forest waiting to the east.
description.atmospheric: A cold wind blows from the west, carrying the scent of distant places you'll never see. Your journey lies eastward.

west.blockedMessage: The western lands stretch endlessly beyond. Your journey lies to the east, toward the Enchanted Forest.

interactables.name: Old Boundary Stone
interactables.examineText: A weathered stone marker, half-buried in the earth. It once marked the edge of settled territory. Beyond this point, only wilderness.
